content.text:
Please select a set of best torrent ID for a movie, or best torrent IDs to cover ALL SEASONS of a TV show.

ALL SEASONS: If there is only S1, select one torrent ID for S1. If there are both S1 and S2, select one torrent ID for each (2 total). In some extreme cases, you can choose e.g. a torrent that covers multiple seasons, but please only do that when independent per-season torrents are either not found or is very bad. (This only applies for TV shows, since different movies have different IMDB entries, and the occasional inclusion of an earlier/later movie in the same franchise in the torrent list is usually a mistake).

Please output the torrent IDs separated by space. Example: 112233 445566

Criteria for determining the best torrent, ordered by importance:

## Resolution

Select the highest reasonable resolution for the show’s native/master quality. Usually this means the highest resolution, but be ware of upscales! I do not want upscaled shows. For example, if a torrent claim to have 4K resolution for e.g. Suzumiya Haruhi no Yuuutsu aired in 2006, do not choose it since it is definitely an upscale.

## Original Audio

I would like original voice overs. For a japanese show, it must include Japanese voice over (日配). If there are multiple voice overs (e.g. [中/日/英配]) that's okay! However, DO NOT choose a torrent that does not have the original voice over langauge.

## Subtitles

Subtitle for Japanese Show: 简繁日 > 简日/繁日 > 英日 > 简繁 > 简/繁 > 英 > Raw
Subtitle for English Show: 简繁英 > 简英/繁英 > 英 > 简/繁 > Raw

## Composition

I prefer individual torrents for each season. Do not choose per-episode torrents or torrents with multiple seasons combine. You should only choose them when individual torrents are not available.

## Space / Bitrate

It must be reasonably small. I care more about playback/streaming experience than raw picture quality or collecting. Please avoid options that take e.g. >25GB for a single 12-episode season.

## Popularity

The more popular the better (determined by seeder and snatches)

DO NOT select a dead seed (one without any seeder).

## Codec

AV1 > x265/h265 > VP9 > x264/H.264/AVC
